name: Minimum Variance Full Universe
description: Minimum Variance optimization across all 13 assets: global equities (VUSA, EQQQ, AIGC, IIND, IMEU, IWRD), precious metals (SSLN, SGLN), commodities (COMM, BRNT, CRUD, WCOA), and bonds (VUTY). Quadratic optimization finds the globally lowest-volatility portfolio across the full investable universe.
